alert.clockOffset: Your system clock is out of sync with the server by more than 5 seconds. This may cause issues with passkey authentication and two-factor authentication. Please sync your clock if issues arise. Current offset: {offset} second(s).

form.name: Name
form.truncateDirectory: Do you want to delete all files of this server before performing this action? This cannot be undone.

pagination.empty: No items could be found, it's almost like they are hiding.

errorBoundary.message: An error was encountered by the application while rendering this view. Try refreshing the page.

toast.copyManual: Copy to clipboard: Ctrl+C or Command+C, Enter

alert.impersonating: You are currently impersonating a user. Please be aware that your actions may affect the impersonated user's account. To exit impersonation mode, click the "Stop Impersonating" button in the bottom left corner.

tooltip.cantSave: You do not have permission to save.
tooltip.cantDelete: You do not have permission to delete.

permissionDenied.title: Permission Denied
permissionDenied.content: You do not have permission to access this page.

notFound.title: Not Found
notFound.content: The page you are looking for could not be found.

serverConflict.title: Conflicting Server State
serverConflict.contentSuspended: This server is suspended and cannot be accessed.
serverConflict.contentNodeMaintenance: This server is on a node that is currently under maintenance and cannot be accessed.
serverConflict.contentTransferring: This server is currently being transferred and cannot be accessed until the transfer is complete.
serverConflict.contentInstallFailed: This server failed to install and cannot be accessed until acknowledged.
serverConflict.contentInstalling: This server is currently installing and cannot be accessed until completed.
serverConflict.contentRestoringBackup: This server is currently restoring from a backup and cannot be accessed until completed.

acknowledgeFailure.title: Acknowledge Installation Failure
acknowledgeFailure.content: By acknowledging this installation failure, you are confirming that you are aware of the failed installation and have taken any necessary steps to resolve the issue. This will allow you to regain control over the server.

scheduleDynamicInput.enterVariable: Please enter the variable name to evaluate.
scheduleDynamicInput.enterData: Please enter the data to send.

error.connectionFailed: Unable to connect after multiple attempts. Please refresh the page.
error.connectionClosed: Connection to server was closed. Attempting to reconnect...
error.authFailed: Authentication failed. Attempting to refresh credentials... ({error})
error.authRefreshFailed: Failed to refresh credentials. Please refresh the page to try again.
error.permissionRevoked: Connection closed: your access to this server has been revoked.
error.tokenRefreshLoop: Authentication loop detected. Please refresh the page to try again.

copyingRemote.failedFrom:
Failed to copy {files} from remote server:
{error}
copyingRemote.failedTo:
Failed to copy {files} to remote server:
{error}

welcome.title: Welcome to Calagopus
welcome.subtitle: Let's get your game server management system up and running!
welcome.wizardIntro: This setup wizard will guide you through:

alert.title: Security Notice
alert.description: Choose a strong password. This account will have complete administrative access to all servers and settings.

login.title: Log back in
login.alert: You got logged out during the setup process. Please log back in to continue where you left off.

form.name: Name
form.urlDescription: used for internal communication with the node

error.noLocations: Something went wrong. No locations were found.

form.telemetryDescription: Allow Calagopus to collect limited and anonymous usage data to help improve the application.
form.registrationDescription: Allow new users to register their own account.

eggRepositories.title: Egg Repositories
eggRepositories.description: These are the source repositories of your eggs. You may change these repositories at any time.

pterodactylGame.title: Pterodactyl Game Eggs
pterodactylGame.description: Eggs for games like Minecraft, Terraria, and a lot more.

pterodactylApplication.title: Pterodactyl Application Eggs
pterodactylApplication.description: Eggs for applications like Grafana, Meilisearch, and various databases.

pterodactylGeneral.title: Pterodactyl Generic Eggs
pterodactylGeneral.description: Eggs for generic application runtimes like Node JS, Java, and Rust.

finished.title: Setup Complete!
finished.subtitle: Your Calagopus panel is ready to use

error.notSupported: Your browser does not support passkeys.
error.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred while using your passkey.
error.dismissed: You dismissed or did not interact with the passkey prompt. The used key could also be not registered.
error.invalidState: This passkey is not available or already registered.
error.notSupportedType: Your browser or device does not support this type of passkey.
error.securityError: Passkeys can only be used over HTTPS and with a valid domain.
error.authenticatorError: Something went wrong with the authenticator.
error.constraintError: The authenticator could not meet the required constraints.

passkey.title: Authenticate with Passkey
passkey.subtitle: We found a passkey associated with {username}

totp.title: Two-Factor Authentication
totp.enterCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app

register.title: Register
register.subtitle: Please enter your details to register

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email to receive instructions on how to reset your password
forgotPassword.success: An email has been sent to you with instructions on how to reset your password.

oauth.title: Authenticate with OAuth
oauth.subtitle: Choose any of the providers below to login

home.title: Servers

tooltip.noGroups: No groups available to add server to
tooltip.noGroup: This server is not in any group

deleteServerGroup.title: Confirm Server Group Deletion
deleteServerGroup.content: Are you sure you want to delete **{group}** from your account?

addServerToGroup.title: Add Server to {group}
addServerToGroup.noServers: All servers are already in this group.

page.noGroups: No Groups could be found, time to create one?

home.noServers: No Servers could be found, time to add one?

requireTwoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication Required
requireTwoFactor.description: Two-Factor Authentication is required on your account. Please set it up below to continue using the panel.

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication

toast.enabled: Two-factor authentication enabled successfully. Please copy your recovery codes.

disableTwoFactor.title: Disable Two-Factor Authentication
disableTwoFactor.description: Disabling two-factor authentication will make your account less secure.

setupTwoFactor.title: Setup Two-Factor Authentication
setupTwoFactor.description: Help protect your account from unauthorized access. You'll be prompted for a verification code each time you sign in.
setupTwoFactor.descriptionQR: Scan the QR code above using the two-factor authentication app of your choice. Then, enter the 6-digit code generated into the field below.

recoveryCodes.title: Recovery Codes
recoveryCodes.description: Below are your recovery codes. Store these in a safe place. If you lose access to your authentication device, you can use these codes to regain access to your account.

twoFactor.twoFactorDisabled: You do not currently have two-factor verification enabled on your account. Click the button below to begin configuring it.

form.startOnGroupedServers: Start on the Grouped Servers page

tooltip.secureContextRequired: A secure context (HTTPS) is required to use security keys.

deleteSecurityKey.title: Confirm Security Key Deletion
deleteSecurityKey.content: Are you sure you want to delete **{key}** from your account?

deleteSession.title: Confirm Session Deletion
deleteSession.content: Are you sure you want to delete the session **{ip}** from your account?

shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Use these keyboard shortcuts to navigate and interact with the panel more efficiently.

serverList.title: Server List
serverList.selectServer: Hold S and click to select/deselect server

deleteSshKey.title: Confirm SSH Key Deletion
deleteSshKey.content: Are you sure you want to delete **{name}** from your account?

deleteCommandSnippet.title: Confirm Command Snippet Deletion
deleteCommandSnippet.content: Are you sure you want to delete **{name}** from your account?

deleteOAuthLink.title: Confirm OAuth Link Deletion
deleteOAuthLink.content: Are you sure you want to delete the **{provider}** connection from your account?

deleteApiKey.title: Confirm API Key Deletion
deleteApiKey.content: Are you sure you want to delete **{name}** from your account?

notification.nodeMaintenance: Your Server is on a node that is currently under maintenance.
notification.transferring: Your Server is currently being transferred to another node.
notification.restoringBackup: Your Server is currently restoring from a backup. Please wait...
notification.installing: Your Server is currently being installed. Please wait...

message.transferCompleted: Transfer has completed successfully. Reconnecting to server...
message.pullingImage: Your Server is currently pulling it's docker image. Please wait...

eula.title: Minecraft EULA Agreement
eula.content: The Minecraft server requires you to accept the [Minecraft End User License Agreement](https://minecraft.net/eula) before it can start.
eula.contentDetails: By clicking "Accept EULA", you agree to the terms of the Minecraft EULA and the **eula.txt** file will be updated to **eula=true**.

forceStop.title: Forcibly Stop Process
forceStop.content: Forcibly stopping a server can lead to data corruption.

settings.clickOnce: Click once to open file or folder
settings.preferPhysicalSize: Show physical size instead of logical size

activeUploads.title: Active Uploads
activeUploads.content: Are you sure you want to leave this page? You have {files} active file uploads. If you leave this page, the file uploads will abort.

unsavedChanges.title: Unsaved Changes
unsavedChanges.content: You have unsaved changes in the file editor. Are you sure you want to leave this page? If you leave, your changes will be lost.

copyRemote.createdAs: These files will be created on the remote server under

searchFiles.title: Search Files

pullFile.title: Pull File
pullFile.createdAs: This file will be created as

deleteDatabase.title: Confirm Database Deletion
deleteDatabase.content: Deleting a database is a permanent action, it cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the **{name}** database and remove all associated data.

dropzone.title: Drop some files here to import them as Schedules
dropzone.subtitle: Release to start importing

deleteSchedule.title: Confirm Schedule Deletion
deleteSchedule.content: Are you sure you want to delete {name} from this server?

deleteStep.content: Are you sure you want to delete this schedule step?

alert.noActions: No actions configured for this schedule
alert.noTriggers: No triggers configured for this schedule

card.content: On Cron Interval `{schedule}`, Next run is {timestamp} - Last run was {lastTimestamp}.
When Console Output reaches line that contains `{contains}`

renderer.noActionSelected: Select an action type to configure

empty.title: No Steps Configured
empty.description: This schedule doesn't have any steps yet. Add some actions to get started.

form.formatStringDescription: The format string, can include variables by wrapping inside {wrapper}

form.emailPlaceholder: Enter the email that this subuser should be saved as.

removeSubuser.title: Confirm Subuser Removal
removeSubuser.content: Are you sure you want to remove **{username}** from this server?

tooltip.limitReached: This server is limited to {max} backups.

deleteBackup.title: Confirm Backup Deletion

startup.title: Startup
startup.dockerImageDescription: The Docker image used to run this server. This can be changed to use a different image.
startup.dockerImageDescriptionCustom: The Docker image used to run this server. This has been set by an administrator and cannot be changed.

attachMount.title: Attach Mount
attachMount.content: Do you want to attach **{name}** to `{target}`?

toast.attached: {name} has been mounted to your server.

detachMount.title: Detach Mount
detachMount.content: Do you want to detach **{name}** from `{target}`?

toast.detached: {name} has been removed from your server.

reinstall.title: Reinstall Server
reinstall.content: Reinstalling your server will stop it, and then re-run the installation script that initially set it up. **Some files may be deleted or modified during this process, please back up your data before continuing.**
